ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "area_income" REAL /* Average income of the user's area */,
  "daily_internet_usage" REAL /* Average daily internet usage in minutes */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's interaction */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "login_frequency" TEXT /* Login frequency of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type of the user */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type of the user */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "topic_line" TEXT /* The topic line of the advertisement */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the ad was shown */,
  "clicked_on_ad" INTEGER /* Whether the ad was clicked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saw the ad */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the ad */,
  "ad_category" TEXT /* Category of the ad */,
  "ad_targeting" TEXT /* Targeting options of the ad */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of ad impressions */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of ad clicks */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of ad conversions */,
  "ad_delivery_method" TEXT /* Ad delivery method */,
  "ad_delivery_date" TEXT /* Ad delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement */,
  "daily_time_spent" REAL /* Average daily time spent on the ad */,
  "clicked_on_ad" INTEGER /* Whether the ad was clicked */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance record */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per ad click */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost per ad conversion */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend */,
  "age_range_performance" TEXT /* Ad performance by age range */,
  "gender_performance" TEXT /* Ad performance by gender */,
  "ethnicity_performance" TEXT /* Ad performance by ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ad_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the user with the ad */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement record */,
  "engagement_time" REAL /* Time spent engaging with the ad */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the ad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ad_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ad_engagement_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)
